---
name: Vendored skill update
about: Track an upstream change to a vendored skill under dot-config/opencode/skills/
title: "[skill-update] "
labels: skills, upstream
assignees: ""
---

## Skill

Which skill directory is affected (e.g. `dot-config/opencode/skills/python-pro/`)?

## Upstream source

URL of the upstream repo and the commit/tag/SHA being mirrored.

## What changed

A short summary of the relevant upstream changes.

## Local adjustments

Did you make any local changes to the vendored content beyond
the upstream mirror? If so, list them.
